LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AALTO CONSULTING LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER OF DEFENDANT DEMOS ON DEMAND, INC. IS GRANTED WITH 30-DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT HAS 30-DAYS LEAVE TO OBTAIN COUNSEL AND FILE A PROPER AMENDED ANSWER. IF NO PROPER AMENDED ANSWER IS FILED WITHIN 20 DAYS, THEN DEFENDANT MAY BE SUBJECT TO A DEFAULT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Set For Trial On Feb-14-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Answer Of Defendant Demos On Demand, Inc. [Ccp 435-437]
Off Calendar Jun-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joshua Bloomfield of Law Office of Joshua Bloomfield telephone number 415-889-3370 for Plaintiff AALTO Consulting LLC.
Defendant Phil Alape telephone number 415-467-0865 in Propria Persona.

The Court modified its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AALTO CONSULTING LLC'S Motion To Strike Answer Of Defendant Demos On Demand, Inc. is granted with 30-days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Defendant has 30-days leave to obtain counsel and file a proper amended answer. If no proper amended answer is filed within 20 days, then defendant may be subject to a default. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
